ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the data point */,
  "lon" REAL /* Longitude of the data point */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation amount */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the data point */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data point */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the data is collected */,
  "data_format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data format */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_data_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_format_id") REFERENCES data_formats ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_month FOREIGN KEY ("month") REFERENCES months ("month_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the region was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the region was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "months" (
  "month_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each month */,
  "month_name" TEXT /* Name of the month */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the month entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the month entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("month_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_value" INTEGER /* Value of the year */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the year entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the year entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data source was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the format */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data format was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data format was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "meta_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the metadata belongs to */,
  "meta_key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata */,
  "meta_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meta_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being versioned */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)
